definitions: An itchy inflammation of the skin, typically with small red spots, that results from sweat being trapped in the pores, especially in hot, humid weather.
A skin condition characterized by small, red, itchy bumps that occurs when sweat ducts become blocked and sweat is trapped under the skin.
examples: The baby developed heat rash in the humid weather.
Applying a cool compress can help soothe heat rash.
Preventing heat rash involves staying cool and dry.
